query: 這是我上週寫好的 spec 草稿，裡面已經有物件跟狀態，幫我做一次 adversarial completeness critique 抓漏洞
notes: direct member ask on an EXISTING spec draft — must land on completeness-critic itself, not the new using-loom-spec entry. A FAMILY grade here (using-loom-spec firing instead) would indicate the new entry is stealing a direct member ask, which B1/C1's acceptance explicitly forbids, even though the grader doesn't auto-score FAMILY as OVER.

query: 我們已經有一個產品構想了，現在想直接訂一份 PRINCIPLES.md，包含北極星跟幾條可證偽的產品原則
notes: direct member ask for product-principles itself — must not be stolen by the new using-loom-product-principles entry. FAMILY grade here would flag entry-stealing for follow-up, not an automatic OVER.

query: 這是我的功能種子：多人協作編輯文件。幫我直接 fan out 出所有物件、狀態、edge case，寫成 spec 驗收條件
notes: direct member ask to draft a fresh spec from a seed — must land on spec-expansion itself, not the using-loom-spec entry. Tests the same entry-stealing concern as the completeness-critic near-miss above.

query: 這個登入功能有個 bug：使用者輸入錯誤密碼時系統會直接噴 500 錯誤，我要修好它
notes: negative-guard case (bug fix on existing code) — per the reception's negative guard this should proceed directly without the design-side recommendation interrupting. Expected is scoped to the loom-code family only; a fire from using-loom-product-principles/using-loom-interface-design/using-loom-spec would MISS, catching an over-eager design-side entry.

notes: negative-guard case (refactor, no new behavior) — the design-side recommendation must not interrupt. Expected scoped to loom-code family; a design-side entry firing here would MISS.
